description.p: A sport training application for Linux. Features a configurable round timer with pause periods and audio alerts, a training plan builder with multi-round circuit support, and an AI coach for generating personalized plans.

ul.li: Home page with quick access to recent and recommended workouts
Configurable round timer with adjustable rounds, duration, and pause
Training plan builder with timed and rep-based exercises
Multi-round circuits with configurable rest between rounds
AI coach for generating training plans with local or cloud LLMs
Built-in exercise database with 873 exercises and images
11 pre-built default training plans, including pop culture-inspired workouts
Training history with per-exercise logging and CSV export/import
Customizable sound effects for different events
Fullscreen mode for workout sessions

description.p: Steam Deck scaling fix: bottom controls and controller hints no longer cut off after switching tabs.

ul.li: Fixed font scaling to use content area dimensions instead of full window, preventing zoom-in on tab switch
Reserved bottom space for buttons and controller hints overlay in font calculations
Reduced timer font size ratio and cap for better fit on small screens
Scoped deck-mode button CSS to avoid inflating SpinRow controls
Added Fullscreen preference (Auto/On/Off) in Controller & Deck Mode settings
Replaced hardcoded 1280×800 baseline with dynamic allocation-based sizing
Debounced font updates on resize to avoid flicker during fullscreen transitions
Reduced controller hints overlay size for less screen obstruction

description.p: Image fix: reusable picture widget prevents workout resize. Plus editor layout, plan export/import.

ul.li: Fixed window resize when exercise images change during workout (single reusable Gtk.Picture)
Moved "Add Exercise" / "Browse Exercises" buttons above exercises list in editor
Export/Import training plans (JSON format)

description.p: Steam Deck: native resolution window, hints refresh on phase changes.

ul.li: Set window size to 1280x800 (Steam Deck native) when deck mode detected
Fixed Guide button idle_add callback (was returning tuple, not SOURCE_REMOVE)
Controller hints now update when workout phase changes (exercise/rest/round break/summary)

description.p: Steam Deck: auto-maximize, instant dark mode, skip exercise.

ul.li: Auto-maximize window on Steam Deck at startup
Guide button now uses deferred fullscreen toggle for Gamescope
Force Dark Mode now applies immediately (no restart needed)
Y button skips exercises during workout (not just rest)

description.p: Steam Deck bugfixes: fullscreen, dark mode, workout resize.

ul.li: Guide button now toggles true fullscreen (not maximize)
Added "Force Dark Mode" toggle in Preferences for Steam Deck
Fixed window resize when Done button appears/disappears during rep-based exercises
Updated README with correct controller controls

description.p: Full gamepad and controller support for Steam Deck and desktop.

ul.li: D-pad navigation with visible focus indicator across all pages
A: enter/activate, B: back/close, X: toggle/reset
Y: skip rest, Start: pause/resume/start workout
Select: preferences/keyboard, Guide: toggle fullscreen
L1/R1: switch tabs, L2/R2: scroll detail views
Exercise picker, settings dialog, and confirmation dialogs fully controller-navigable
Exercise editor: expand rows with A, adjust values with D-pad left/right
Fixed font scaling on fullscreen and maximize toggle

description.p: Initial release with round timer, training plans, AI coach, multi-round circuits, and history.
